code-reviewer.description: Reviews all branches merged in a sprint session; reports CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW findings per branch. Findings are advisory — no branch is blocked or re-queued.

coder.description: Implements a single issue using TDD, verifies checks, commits.

crew:afk.description: Orchestrator that spawns parallel coder agents in isolated worktrees, merges completed branches, runs a code-reviewer pass, and loops until all ready-for-agent issues are done.

crew:karpathy-guidelines.description: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes (think, simplify, surgical, goal-driven).

crew:tdd.description: Test-driven development with red-green-refactor loop, vertical slices.

crew:dep-install.description: Detect install mode (host or docker) and install project dependencies once. Shared by solve-issue, address-code-review, and address-pr-comments.

crew:solve-issue.description: Implement a single issue end-to-end: read, explore, install, TDD, verify, commit.

crew:address-code-review.description: Triage and fix findings from an afk-run code review report using TDD.

crew:address-pr-comments.description: Fetch PR review comments, challenge each critically, implement sensible ones with TDD, commit and push.

crew:improve-codebase-architecture.description: Find deepening opportunities — refactors that turn shallow modules into deep ones for testability and AI-navigability.

crew:grill-me.description: Interview the user relentlessly about a plan until reaching shared understanding. Exploratory only — no implementation.

crew:grill-with-docs.description: Grilling session that challenges a plan against the domain model, sharpens terminology, updates CONTEXT.md and ADRs inline.

crew:to-issues.description: Break a plan or PRD into independently-grabbable issues using tracer-bullet vertical slices.

crew:to-prd.description: Synthesize conversation context into a PRD and publish to the issue tracker.

crew:plan.description: Full design pipeline: grill → PRD → issues. One handoff after grilling triggers the rest automatically.

crew:caveman.description: Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts token usage ~75% by speaking like caveman while keeping full technical accuracy. Supports lite/full/ultra and wenyan intensity levels.
